title: Settings
sectionAccountDesc: Your identity, profile, and connection details.
sectionAppearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of the application.
sectionMessagingDesc: Choose how messages are displayed in conversations.
sectionAudioVideoDesc: Configure your camera, microphone, and call quality settings.
sectionDataDesc: Manage your locally stored data. All data is stored on this device only.
sectionDeveloperDesc: Diagnostic tools for debugging WebRTC calls, media quality, and performance.
subIdentityDesc: Your decentralized identity and recovery options.
themeDesc: Choose a color theme for the entire app.
darkModeDesc: Switch between light and dark themes.
accentColorDesc: Choose a primary color for buttons, links, and highlights.
textSizeDesc: Adjust the base text size across the app.
fontDesc: Choose a typeface for the entire app. Install more fonts from the Marketplace.
languageDesc: Choose the display language for the app interface.
animationsDesc: Enable or disable all UI animations.
shimmerDesc: Toggle shimmer sweeps and gradient shifts.
reduceMotionDesc: Minimize motion for accessibility. Overrides all animation settings.
callingDesc: Configure incoming call behavior and ring volume.
incomingCallDisplayDesc: How incoming calls appear when the app is open.
videoQualityDesc: Set the default video quality for calls.
testVideoDesc: Preview your camera with the current video effect applied.
videoEffectsDesc: Apply background effects to your camera during calls.
backgroundEffectDesc: Choose how your background appears on video calls.
customImageUrl: Or use a custom image URL:
audioQualityDesc: Choose an audio codec and quality preset.
pcmWarning: Lossless audio uses ~1.4 Mbps. Ensure you have a stable connection.
applicationModeDesc: Optimize encoding for voice, music, or low latency.
fecDesc: Adds redundancy to resist packet loss.
volumeControlsDesc: Adjust input and output volume levels.
voiceMeterDesc: Test your microphone levels and check for clipping.
lowLevel: Low — speak louder or raise mic volume
devicesDesc: Your available audio and video input/output devices.
devicesDescMobile: Camera and microphone are managed by your device.
mediaDevicesUnavailable: Media devices are not available in this browser or environment.
switchCameraHint: Switch cameras during a call using the camera flip button.
devicePermissionsHint: Device permissions are managed by your device settings. Camera and microphone access will be requested when you start a call.
noiseSuppressionDesc: Reduce background noise from your microphone.
encryptionDesc: Call signaling is always end-to-end encrypted. Optionally encrypt media frames too.
mediaE2EEAvailable: Encrypts audio and video frames with AES-256-GCM. May increase CPU usage.
mediaE2EEUnavailable: Not available in this browser. Supported in Chrome and Edge.
mediaE2EEWarning: Media E2EE is enabled. Both peers must have this setting enabled for encrypted media. Call signaling (SDP, ICE) is always encrypted regardless of this setting.
p2pNetworkDesc: Start or stop the peer-to-peer network.
relayServersDesc: Relay servers store messages while you or your friends are offline.
invalidRelayUrl: URL must start with wss:// or ws://
duplicateRelay: This relay is already in the list.
runOwnRelayDesc: Download the relay binary and host your own server
connectToPeerDesc: Exchange connection data with another user to establish a direct P2P link.
didShareDesc: Share your DID for others to add you as a friend.
connectionStateWaitingForAnswer: Waiting for answer — share the offer below
localStorageDesc: Your messages, friends, and conversations are stored locally using IndexedDB. Data is isolated per identity and persists across page refreshes.
clearMessagesDesc: Delete all messages, reactions, pins, and threads. Your friends, groups, and conversations will be kept.
clearAllDataDesc: Delete everything: messages, friends, groups, and conversations. Your identity is preserved.
clearMessagesDialogDesc: This will permanently delete all messages, reactions, pins, and threads from this device. Your friends and groups will be kept. This action cannot be undone.
clearAllDataDialogDesc: This will permanently delete ALL locally stored data including messages, friends, groups, and conversations. Your identity and recovery phrase are NOT affected. This action cannot be undone.
pluginsDesc: Extend Umbra with plugins. {{count}} plugin(s) active.
browseMarketplace: Browse the marketplace to discover and install plugins that extend Umbra's functionality.
shortcutsDesc: Shortcuts registered by plugins and the app. Press the key combination to trigger the action.
noShortcuts: No keyboard shortcuts registered yet. Install plugins that register shortcuts to see them here.
devToolsWarning: These settings are for debugging. Raw media capture uses significant disk space. Some options may affect call performance when enabled.
enableDiagnosticsDesc: Master switch for all diagnostic features
statsOverlayDesc: Real-time stats overlay during active calls
frameTimingAlertsDesc: Log alerts when frame intervals drift >5ms from target
ringBufferLoggingDesc: Log audio ring buffer state per frame for garble detection
codecNegotiationLogDesc: Log SDP codec negotiation on both sides and diff for mismatches
degradationDetectionDesc: Auto-capture state snapshots when quality metrics degrade
rawMediaCaptureDesc: Dump raw PCM audio (.wav) and I420 video (.yuv) to disk before encoding
avSyncValidationDesc: Enable frame counter, click track, and timestamp sync checks
referenceSignalModeDesc: Replace all media with a 440Hz sine wave test tone for quality validation
fullBrowserResetDesc: Wipe all local data: databases, localStorage, sessionStorage, caches, and service workers. You will be logged out and all local data will be permanently deleted.
resetConfirmWarning: This will permanently delete ALL local data including your wallet, messages, contacts, and settings. You will need to re-import your wallet to use Umbra again.
resetWarningMessage: Warning: This action cannot be undone.
aboutDescription: Umbra is a private, peer-to-peer messaging application with end-to-end encryption. Built with Ed25519/X25519/AES-256-GCM cryptography and WebRTC for direct communication.
bubbleDisplayDesc: Messages appear in colored bubbles. Your messages are on the right, theirs on the left.
inlineDisplayDesc: All messages are left-aligned with sender name and timestamp. Similar to Slack or Discord.
keyRotationSuccess: Your encryption key has been rotated successfully. {{count}} friend(s) were notified.
logoutMessage: You'll be signed out of this account. Your account data is saved and you can sign back in from the login screen.
notificationsDesc: Control how and when you receive alerts and updates.
notifPushDesc: Receive push notifications for new messages and mentions.
notifPreviewDesc: Show message content in notification banners.
soundsDesc: Choose a sound theme and control which sounds play.
soundsEnableDesc: Master toggle for all UI sounds.
privacyDesc: Manage your visibility and control what others can see.
privacyReadReceiptsDesc: Let others know when you've seen their messages.
privacyReadReceiptsHelp1: This is a two-way setting — you also see when they've read yours
privacyTypingIndicatorsDesc: Show when you are typing a message to others.
privacyOnlineStatusDesc: Show your online status to other users.
privacyPinLockDesc: Require a PIN to unlock the app and access your keys.
privacyPinLockHelp1: Your private keys stay encrypted behind the PIN
privacyPinLockHelp2: You can change or remove the PIN anytime
groupE2eeDesc: Messages are encrypted with a shared group key
groupRotateKeyDesc: Generate a new encryption key. Recommended after removing a member.
groupLeaveDesc: You will no longer receive messages from this group
groupDeleteDesc: Permanently remove this group for all members
groupLeaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave "{{name}}"? You will no longer receive messages and will need a new invite to rejoin.
groupDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove the group for all members.
groupRemoveMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the group? You should rotate the group key after removing a member.
profileBannerDesc: A wide header image for your profile.
profileBannerUpload: Click to upload a banner image
profileAvatarDesc: Your profile picture. Click to upload a new image.
profileDisplayNameDesc: How others see you in conversations.
profileCustomStatusDesc: Set a custom status message with emoji.
identityShareHelp: Share it with friends to connect
identityNeverChanges: It never changes unless you create a new wallet
identityDidHelp: Your DID is derived from your cryptographic keys. It's your permanent, verifiable identity on the network.
identityDidHighlight: Unlike usernames, a DID can't be impersonated — it's mathematically tied to your private keys.
sharingQrHelp: Others can scan this QR code with Umbra to instantly add you as a friend.
sharingQrContains: The QR code contains your DID
sharingQrSafe: It's safe to share — it only contains your public identity
sharingQrScan: Scanning initiates a friend request automatically
sharingScanDesc: Others can scan this code to connect with you.
syncHelp: Keep your friends, groups, preferences, and blocked users synced across all your devices.
syncHelpEncrypted: Data is encrypted with your recovery phrase
syncHelpOnlyYou: Only you can decrypt your synced data
syncHelpNoMessages: Messages and files are NOT synced
syncDescription: Encrypted sync of account data across devices.
syncAutoDesc: Automatically sync friends, groups, and preferences
syncDeleteWarning: This will permanently delete your synced data from the relay server. Your local data will not be affected. This cannot be undone.
dangerLogoutHelp: Logging out removes your identity from this device. Make sure you've saved your recovery phrase first!
dangerLogoutHighlight: Without your recovery phrase, you'll lose access to your identity, friends, and message history permanently.
dangerLogoutDesc: Logging out will clear your current session.
dangerRotateKeyWarning: This will regenerate your encryption keys and notify all connected friends. Messages sent with your old key will no longer be decryptable by new sessions.
dangerRotateKeyReestablish: Your friends will need to re-establish encrypted sessions.
linkedSignIn: Sign in to manage linked accounts
linkedDescription: Link your accounts from other platforms so friends can find you on Umbra.
usernameShareHelp: Share this with friends so they can find you
usernamePrompt: Set a username so friends can find you by name instead of DID.
usernameRules: 1-32 characters. Letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only. A numeric tag will be auto-assigned.
usernameChangeWarning: Changing your username will assign a new tag. Your old username will become available for others.
helpP2pNetworkText: The P2P network connects you directly to friends without any central server. Messages travel directly between devices.
helpP2pNetworkHighlight: When enabled, your device participates in the decentralized network and can exchange messages in real-time.
helpP2pFallback: Falls back to relay server for offline message delivery
helpPeerIdText: Your Peer ID is used by the P2P network to identify your device. It's different from your DID.
helpPeerIdDevice: Peer ID = this device's network address (changes per session)
helpDirectP2pText: Exchange offer/answer data to establish a direct encrypted connection with another Umbra user.
helpDirectP2pHighlight: This creates a WebRTC data channel — messages travel directly between browsers with no server in between.
helpDirectP2pStep1: Step 1: Create an offer and share it
helpDirectP2pStep2: Step 2: Your peer pastes your offer and generates an answer
helpDirectP2pStep3: Step 3: Paste their answer to complete the connection
helpClearAllDataText: This removes all locally stored data including messages, friends, groups, and conversations.
helpClearAllDataHighlight: Your identity and recovery phrase are NOT affected. You can still log back in, but you'll need to re-add friends and start new conversations.
